svg.title: Case-level quality deltas
svg.desc: Signed pass/pass judge score deltas for concrete high-signal eval cases.
svg.text: Every number is a judge-score delta on a concrete eval case after both hard gates pass.
Positive and negative colors are explained separately in each block; blanks are excluded quality comparisons, not zeros.
Read this as instruction-change impact on the same model. Red cells are concrete regressions versus the previous instructions.
Column mini-summary uses all pass/pass cases. Rows below are selected watchlist cases, so they are intentionally not representative.
External models vs GPT on current instructions
Read this as current-instruction model gap. Red cells mean GPT's answer was better; blue cells mean the external model beat GPT.
Column mini-summary uses all pass/pass cases. Rows below are selected watchlist cases, so they are intentionally not representative.
External models vs GPT on previous instructions
Read this as the previous-instruction model gap, so current/previous gap movement can be compared case by case.
Column mini-summary uses all pass/pass cases. Rows below are selected watchlist cases, so they are intentionally not representative.
Current instructions vs reference bundles (v4.12 saved)
Read this as saved reference context, not fresh v4.13 provider evidence. Red cells are reference wins worth inspecting.
Column mini-summary uses all pass/pass cases. Rows below are selected watchlist cases, so they are intentionally not representative.
Scope: v4.13 OpenAI-judged GPT/GLM/DeepSeek saved outputs; Grok/reference/no-instruction charts use labeled v4.12 saved snapshots.
Source: saved quality pair reports filtered to both sides passed
